case_title: POUND, TODD VS LIM, DARLENE et al

docket_entries.description: PLFT'S TODD POUND REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. SENT COPY OF DENIAL WITH PROOF OF MAILING TO ALL PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY POUND, TODD AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, DARLENE JACOBSON, TOM SIMMONS, MICHAEL K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, DARLENE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, DARLENE JACOBSON, TOM SIMMONS, MICHAEL K. PLAINTIFF SPLIT CAUSE OF ACTION. SEE CASE #770677. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MICHAEL SIMMONS RETURNED - MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS- UNABLE TO FORWARD.
PLTFF FILING MOTION FOR CONSIDERATION,PAID$14 CHEC K,GAVE COPY&RECEIPT,TO WAIT MAIL OR CALL AT LEAST 15 DAYS,MAILED COPY TO OTHER PARTY;GAVE TO FANNIE.
COPY OF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION TO MICHAEL SIMMONS RETURNED TO SENDER-MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS. UNABLE TO FORWARD.
